betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Leviathan Steam Turbine§f

§aThe ultimate steam turbine — processes massive steam volumes with ease, no GUI needed!§f

§bThe Leviathan Steam Turbine§f is a massive pseudo-multiblock machine capable of processing very large amounts of steam at once, limited only by fluid transfer rates. Significantly more powerful than the Industrial Steam Turbine.

§6Crafting§f (§bAssembly Machine§f):
§b• 6×§f Steel Shell
§b• 16×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• 12×§f Titanium Plate
§b• 16×§f Technetium Steel Ingot
§b• 5×§f Reinforced Turbofan Blades
§b• 3×§f Titanium Steam Turbine
§b• 1×§f Beryllium Flywheel
§b• 48×§f Dense Gold Wire
§b• 16×§f High-Speed Steel Pipe
§b• 16×§f Steel Pipe

§6Specifications§f:
§b• No GUI§f — compression level set via large lever on side
§b• Water buffer§f: §e1,000,000,000 mB§f (1 billion)
§b• Steam buffer§f: §e1,000,000,000 mB§f
§b• Power buffer§f: §e100,000,000,000 HE§f (100 GHE)
§b• Processing§f: §eInstantaneous§f — handles any steam volume
§b• Efficiency§f: §c85%§f (less efficient than Industrial Turbine's 100%)

§eTip§f: Use for high-volume low-pressure steam where multiple Industrial Turbines would be impractical. Ideal for the Fusion Reactor and large RBMK designs. The 85% efficiency means you lose 15% power — only use when throughput matters more than efficiency!
